---
title: "Ecology & Env. Science Resources List"
---

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vT2pt1iJeOB-Dq3ZZTrSK9HqhNeFDm1aS9SM3414lqQsKe9OHa7ZQeWJKv_lI2zCGr1PLoZLwPp7Z2D/pub?embedded=true"></iframe>


#### ***Statistics:***

#### ***Programming:***

#### ***Data visualization:***

#### ***Modelling:***

#### ***Environmental Data Science:***

#### ***Spatial / GIS / Remote Sensing:***

-   [coding club gee](https://ourcodingclub.github.io/tutorials/earth-engine/)
-   [coding club r geospatial](https://ourcodingclub.github.io/tutorials/spatial-vector-sf/)
-   [rGEE examples (250+)](https://csaybar.github.io/rgee-examples/)
-   [rGEE](https://r-spatial.github.io/rgee/)
-   [spatial data science with R and ‘terra’](https://rspatial.org)
-   [geocomputation w/ R](https://r.geocompx.org/intro.html)
-   [intro to spatial R](https://oliviergimenez.github.io/intro_spatialR/)
-   []()
	
#### ***Climate Resources:***

#### ***Job Websites:***

#### ***Career Advice:***

-   [usa jobs guide for biologists and ecologists](https://jabberwocky.weecology.org/2021/06/14/usajobs-guide/)
